Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Canada Shipping Act, 2001 (anchorage prohibition)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Canada Shipping Act, 2001 (anchorage prohibition)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Canada Shipping Act, 2001 to prohibit the anchoring of vessels within certain waters.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: The Canada Shipping Act, 2001 is amended by adding the following after section 23:

Subsection.Text: In this section, prohibited waters means the waters described in Schedule 1.1.
No person shall anchor a vessel within prohibited waters.
Subsection (2) does not apply in respect of a pleasure craft.
On the recommendation of the Minister of Transport, the Governor in Council may, by order, add a description of prohibited waters to Schedule 1.1.

Section.Text: The Act is amended by adding the following after section 37:
Every person who contravenes section 23.1 (anchoring in prohibited waters) commits an offence and is liable on summary conviction to a fine of not more than $100,000.
The Act is amended by adding, after Schedule 1, the Schedule 1.1 set out in the schedule to this Act.

Provision.Text: Southern Strait of Georgia 芒聙聰 Province of British Columbia
Beginning at a point at latitude 48脗掳45芒聙虏21芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳36芒聙虏07芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 48脗掳45芒聙虏11芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳35芒聙虏13芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 48脗掳45芒聙虏11芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳35芒聙虏12芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northeasterly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark to a point at latitude 48脗掳48芒聙虏30芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳35芒聙虏18芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 48脗掳49芒聙虏14芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳35芒聙虏19芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northerly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark to a point at latitude 48脗掳51芒聙虏10芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳36芒聙虏38芒聙鲁 West;
Thence easterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 48脗掳51芒聙虏10芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳36芒聙虏37芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 48脗掳51芒聙虏22芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳36芒聙虏20芒聙鲁 West;

Thence northwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 48脗掳56芒聙虏13芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳42芒聙虏50芒聙鲁 West;

Thence northwesterly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark to a point at latitude 48脗掳57芒聙虏50芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳46芒聙虏13芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 48脗掳58芒聙虏52芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳46芒聙虏06芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northeasterly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark to a point at latitude 49脗掳08芒聙虏09芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳49芒聙虏11芒聙鲁 West;
Thence easterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 49脗掳08芒聙虏11芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳49芒聙虏00芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southeasterly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark to a point at latitude 49脗掳08芒聙虏07芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳47芒聙虏18芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southeasterly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark to a point at latitude 49脗掳07芒聙虏54芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳41芒聙虏58芒聙鲁 West;

Thence northeasterly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark to a point at latitude 49脗掳08芒聙虏46芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳41芒聙虏44芒聙鲁 West;
Thence easterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 49脗掳57芒聙虏54芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳08芒聙虏24芒聙鲁 West;
Thence easterly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark to a point at latitude 49脗掳08芒聙虏54芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳41芒聙虏25芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 49脗掳08芒聙虏55芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳41芒聙虏23芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northeasterly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark to a point at latitude 49脗掳09芒聙虏09芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳41芒聙虏26芒聙鲁 West;

Thence northerly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark to a point at latitude 49脗掳09芒聙虏16芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳41芒聙虏55芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark to a point at latitude 49脗掳09芒聙虏34芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳42芒聙虏17芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark to a point at latitude 49脗掳12芒聙虏10芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳49芒聙虏06.2芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 49脗掳13芒聙虏46.7芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳45芒聙虏22.8芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 49脗掳11芒聙虏37芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳40芒聙虏27芒聙鲁 West;

Thence westerly in a straight line to a point at latitude 48脗掳41芒聙虏38芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳16芒聙虏04芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 48脗掳32芒聙虏55芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳13芒聙虏08芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southerly in a straight line to a point at latitude 48脗掳29芒聙虏47芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳11芒聙虏11芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 48脗掳29芒聙虏46芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳18芒聙虏24芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark to a point at latitude 48脗掳30芒聙虏46芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳21芒聙虏38芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northeasterly along the province of British Columbia Tenure to a point at latitude 48脗掳31芒聙虏39芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳21芒聙虏54芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northeasterly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark line to a point at latitude 48脗掳34芒聙虏36芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳22芒聙虏03芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northerly along the province of British Columbia Tenure to a point at latitude 48脗掳34芒聙虏48芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳22芒聙虏12芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northeasterly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark to a point at latitude 48脗掳35芒聙虏13芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳22芒聙虏13芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northerly along the province of British Columbia Tenure to a point at latitude 48脗掳35芒聙虏26芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳22芒聙虏20芒聙鲁 West;

Thence northeasterly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark to a point at latitude 48脗掳38芒聙虏07芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳24芒聙虏18芒聙鲁 West;

Thence westerly along the province of British Columbia Tenure to a point at latitude 48脗掳39芒聙虏00芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳27芒聙虏11芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southwesterly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark to a point at latitude 48脗掳34芒聙虏47芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳28芒聙虏12芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southerly in a straight line to a point at latitude 48脗掳34芒聙虏26芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳28芒聙虏03芒聙鲁 West;

Thence southwesterly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark to a point at latitude 48脗掳30芒聙虏01芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳32芒聙虏48芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southwesterly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark to a point at latitude 48脗掳29芒聙虏36芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳32芒聙虏57芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 48脗掳29芒聙虏36芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳33芒聙虏03芒聙鲁 West;

Thence northeasterly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark to a point at latitude 48脗掳29芒聙虏45芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳33芒聙虏08芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northerly along the province of British Columbia Tenure to a point at latitude 48脗掳29芒聙虏59芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳33芒聙虏14芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northeasterly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark to a point at latitude 48脗掳36芒聙虏17芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳31芒聙虏16芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northerly along the province of British Columbia Tenure to a point at latitude 48脗掳36芒聙虏22芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳31芒聙虏18芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northeasterly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark to a point at latitude 48脗掳36芒聙虏42芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳31芒聙虏07芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northeasterly along the province of British Columbia Tenure to a point at latitude 48脗掳36芒聙虏56芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳31芒聙虏10芒聙鲁 West;
Thence westerly in a straight line to a point at latitude 48脗掳36芒聙虏56芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳31芒聙虏10芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northerly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark to a point at latitude 48脗掳38芒聙虏43芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳32芒聙虏54芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 48脗掳39芒聙虏15芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳32芒聙虏25芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northerly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark to a point at latitude 48脗掳44芒聙虏01芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳35芒聙虏09芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly along the province of British Columbia Tenure to a point at latitude 48脗掳44芒聙虏10芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳35芒聙虏40芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark to a point at latitude 48脗掳44芒聙虏26芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳36芒聙虏56芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly along the province of British Columbia Tenure to a point at latitude 48脗掳44芒聙虏35芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳37芒聙虏43芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark to a point at latitude 48脗掳44芒聙虏37芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳37芒聙虏48芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northeasterly along the province of British Columbia Tenure to a point at latitude 48脗掳45芒聙虏50芒聙鲁 North and longitude 123脗掳37芒聙虏18芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southeasterly along the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark to the point of commencement.
All islands within the boundary are excluded following the sinuosity of the ordinary high water mark.
The waters constitute an approximate area of 1,394 square kilometres.
